headline: LYB Partners Mondelez & Others for Flexible Packaging Solution
summary: LYB partners with Mondelez, Amcor and Taghleef to launch 75% recycled-content packaging for Marabou chocolate bars using CirculenRevive polymers.

headline: Is Mondelēz International (MDLZ) One of the Best Blue Chip Dividend Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds?
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 3.28%, Mondelēz International, Inc. (NASDAQ:MDLZ) is included among the 14 Best Blue Chip Dividend Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. Mondelēz International, Inc. (NASDAQ:MDLZ) is an American multinational confectionery, food, and beverage company that employs approximately 80,000 people around the world.
